title: schiedea stellarioides
intro: Schiedea stellarioides, also known as Mauna Kea schiedeia, is a rare and endangered Hawaiian plant species belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, particularly for wound healing and reducing pain. The medicinal properties of Schiedea stellarioides are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Herbal preparations of Schiedea stellarioides can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits and proper usage.
